title: predict-queue-wait input
description:
Inputs for the `predict-queue-wait` primitive (hpc-mapreduce predict-queue-wait --profile

--cluster ). Phase 4 of the queue-wait predictor: when prerequisites are present, dispatches to a discrete-event simulator (DES) backend that runs the FIFO + EASY-backfill scheduler forward against the most recent persisted ClusterSnapshot.

at_iso.description: Reference timestamp the forecast is for; null means now.

seed.description: Optional seed for deterministic DES sampling.
